traefik-env-credential-scan-l9explore.description: Systematic .env and .git/config credential scanner from 185.177.72.61 using l9explore/1.2.2. 59 requests probing: /.env, /.env.config, /.env.default, /.env.dev.local, /.env.staging.local, /.env.template, /.env.test, /.env.production.local, /.env.development.local, /.env.prod.local, /.env_sample, /.env.stage, /settings/.env, /api/.env, /prod/.env, plus .git/config under /admin/, /data/, /core/, /static../, /app/, /project/, /server/, /src/, /public/, /media/, /media../, /files/, /www/. All returned 404 via Traefik (not forwarded to backend). Same scanner IP seen on labong server.

ssh-brute-force-campaign-sortico.description: Sustained SSH brute force from 12+ IPs in the 2h window. Top sources: 193.24.211.95 (9 attempts), 16.58.56.214 (5), 80.94.92.171 (4), 51.75.194.10 (3), 119.1.156.50 (3). Usernames tried: admin, ubuntu, user, ubnt, support, steam, sol, pi, gabriel, administrator, root, default, kevin. All fail at password auth (server requires key-based auth). Normal internet background noise — no signs of targeted attack.

traefik-web-scanner-censys-oai.description: Legitimate web crawlers hitting sortico.de: OAI-SearchBot/1.3 (OpenAI, 4 requests for /robots.txt, 404), CensysInspect/1.1 (3 requests), zgrab/0.x (1 request for /owa/auth/x.js, 404). All benign scanner traffic returning 404. Note: /robots.txt returning 404 means sortico.de has no robots.txt — consider adding one.
